pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage introducing the salon and providing quick access to core waxing, packages, shop, gift cards, offers, and fast booking via featured highlights and quick-book tiles.
primary_functions: Highlight key waxing services, packages, and current offers
Provide prominent entry points to Waxing Services, Mens Waxing, Build Your Own Session, Packages, Shop, Gift Cards, and Offers
Surface a next-available booking call-to-action for users who want to book quickly

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click primary CTA such as 'Browse All Waxing Services'
Click highlight tile for 'Men's Waxing'
Click 'Build Your Own Waxing Session' card
Click a featured waxing package group or 'View Packages' button
Click 'Shop Aftercare' tile
Click 'Gift Cards' hero/banner
Click a 'View All Offers' link
Click a featured service card or 'Book next available' quick-book tile

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry labeled 'Home'
Clicking the salon logo returns to the Home page

pages.name: Waxing Services
pages.description: Master waxing services menu with filters for area, gender, duration, and price, used as the main starting point for selecting individual services or quickly composing simple multi-area sessions (including men's waxing).
primary_functions: Browse all waxing services organized by category (legs, arms, face/brows, bikini/brazilian, body, men)
Filter services by body area (e.g., legs, face, men), sub-area (e.g., full_leg, half_leg), duration, and price
Sort the service list by price, duration, or popularity (e.g., Price: Low to High)
Open a specific service detail and booking page
Quickly add one or more services (e.g., chest and back) to a pending appointment/session before scheduling
Provide a clear entry point to the Build Your Own Waxing Session configurator

incoming_params.description: Optional high-level category filter, e.g., 'men' for Men's Waxing when accessed via the 'Men's Waxing' header link
Optional main area group filter, matching getServiceFilterOptions.main_area_groups.value (e.g., 'legs', 'face_brows')
Optional specific area key (e.g., 'full_leg', 'brazilian') used to pre-filter the list to relevant services
Optional gender segment filter (e.g., 'women', 'men', 'unisex')
Optional minimum duration (in minutes) for filtering services (e.g., 45 for '45 minutes and up')
Optional maximum duration in minutes for filtering services
Optional encoded price range filter key matching getServiceFilterOptions.price_ranges
Optional sort key (e.g., 'price_asc', 'duration_desc', 'popular')
Pagination index for scrolling through many waxing services

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a service name or 'View Details / Book' button in the services list
Click 'Build Your Own Waxing Session' promo or link in-page
After adding multiple services (e.g., men's chest and back) to the pending session, click 'Continue to Booking'

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Waxing Services' and 'Men's Waxing' header links (with categoryId=men parameter for the latter)
Accessible via 'Waxing Services' footer link
Filters and sorting adjusted by query parameters when navigating from offers or other internal links

pages.name: Service Detail & Booking
pages.description: Detail page for a single waxing service, combining service information with single-appointment booking controls and an option to switch into a multi-appointment scheduling flow.
primary_functions: Display full service information including description, price, standard duration, and any preparation/aftercare notes
Show available dates and time slots for this specific service using a calendar and time-picker
Allow users to select a specific date and time (e.g., next Wednesday at 2:30 PM) and add a single appointment to the booking summary
Optionally suggest complementary add-on services and link back to the Waxing Services list

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the waxing service whose details and availability should be displayed

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Schedule multiple visits' or 'Book recurring appointments' to open the multi-appointment booking flow for this service
After selecting a date/time and clicking 'Add to Booking Summary' then 'View Booking Summary'
Click 'Back to Waxing Services' or breadcrumb link

access_methods.description: Accessed when a URL contains ?serviceId=... from lists or featured sections
Linked from service cards on the Waxing Services page and homepage highlights

pages.name: Build Your Own Session
pages.description: Configurator page where users can combine multiple waxing services into a custom session with live price and duration totals, supporting constraints such as target duration and budget.
primary_functions: List waxing services with clear distinction between major areas (e.g., brazilian, full_leg, full_back) and smaller areas (e.g., upper_lip, chin, underarms)
Allow users to add or remove services from a custom session with a running total of price and total duration
Enforce or clearly display constraints such as total duration range (e.g., 80100 minutes) and budget (e.g., under $150)
Allow users to adjust selections (remove a service and replace with a cheaper one) until session constraints are met
Provide a 'Continue to Booking' action that passes the assembled list of services to the Booking & Scheduling page

incoming_params.description: Optional area_key to highlight or pre-filter the list when starting a custom session (e.g., 'brazilian', 'full_leg')
Optional lower bound for recommended total session duration in minutes (e.g., 80)
Optional upper bound for recommended total session duration in minutes (e.g., 100)
Optional budget ceiling for the custom session (e.g., 150 for $150)

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Continue to Booking' once the custom session totals meet desired duration and budget
Click 'View full waxing menu' from within the configurator

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Build a Session' header link
Linked from homepage hero or promos encouraging custom 90-minute sessions
Optional query parameters configure starting filters and recommended constraints

pages.name: Waxing Packages
pages.description: Catalog of pre-configured waxing packages, including body and combination packages for easier booking and discounts, with filtering and sorting options.
primary_functions: Display a list of waxing packages with package name, headline services, total duration, and price
Filter and/or segment packages by type, such as body_waxing_packages, brazilian_packages, mens_packages
Allow users to open a package detail view to see full included services (e.g., check if both brazilian and underarm are included)
Provide 'Book Package' calls-to-action that route to the Package Detail or directly into the Booking & Scheduling flow

incoming_params.description: Optional package type filter (e.g., 'body_waxing_package', 'brazilian_package', 'mens_package')
Optional sort key for packages (e.g., 'price_asc', 'duration_desc')
Pagination index for the packages list

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a package name or 'View Details' link
Click 'Book Package' from a package tile configured to jump straight into scheduling

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Packages' header link
Linked from homepage highlights or from specific offers targeting packages

pages.name: Package Detail
pages.description: Detailed view of a specific waxing package including included services, total duration, and price, with booking entry and promotion eligibility hints.
primary_functions: Show complete package information including all included services (e.g., brazilian and underarm), individual and total durations, and package price
Highlight any conditions required for promotions (e.g., package price over $100 for a 10% off promo)
Allow users to initiate booking for this package via a 'Book Package' button leading to the Booking & Scheduling page
Link back to the Waxing Packages list to compare multiple packages

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the package whose details, included services, and promo eligibility should be shown

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Book Package' on the package detail page
Click 'Back to Packages' or breadcrumb link

access_methods.description: Accessed with ?packageId=... from the Waxing Packages list or promotional links

pages.name: Booking & Scheduling
pages.description: Central scheduling interface used for complex bookings, multi-service sessions, packages, and multi-appointment series, including technician selection and recurring appointment management.
primary_functions: Display the current set of services or package contents being scheduled (from Build Your Own Session, Mens Waxing selections, packages, or single services)
Provide a calendar for selecting an appointment date, supporting scenarios like earliest_available_date, next_week, or same_day
Show available time slots for the selected date, allowing users to choose specific times (e.g., earliest time at or after 5:00 PM)
Offer technician selection where applicable (e.g., choose a named technician for eyebrow waxing and keep that technician across multiple appointments)
Support adding multiple appointments in a series (e.g., three monthly Saturday eyebrow waxing appointments between 911 AM) while keeping selected technician
Allow users to adjust or remove individual appointments from the in-page appointment list before finalizing
Provide a 'Continue' or 'Add to Booking Summary' action that sends all scheduled appointments to the Cart & Booking Summary page

incoming_params.description: Type of appointment to schedule: 'single_service', 'custom_session', or 'package'
When appointmentType='single_service', identifies the Service to schedule (e.g., for eyebrow waxing recurring bookings)
When appointmentType='package', identifies the Package being scheduled
Optional identifier of the source page to support 'Back' actions and analytics (e.g., 'build_session', 'package_detail')
Optional mode indicating a multi-appointment flow (e.g., 'series') for recurring bookings of a single service

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Continue' or 'Add to Booking Summary' after configuring one or more appointments
Click a 'View service details' link for the current single service from within the booking flow
Click 'Edit services in custom session' when scheduling a custom session appointment

access_methods.description: Reached from service, session, or package pages with parameters indicating what is being scheduled

pages.name: Shop Products
pages.description: Product catalog for retail items such as waxing aftercare, with filters for price, rating, and fulfillment options including free in-store pickup.
primary_functions: Browse products by category (e.g., aftercare, skincare, accessories) using a category filter such as categoryId=aftercare
Filter products by maximum price (e.g., set max price to $30), star rating (e.g., 4_stars_and_up), and fulfillment type (e.g., in_store_pickup)
Sort products and scan key product info like price, rating, and pickup availability
Open individual product detail pages
Add products directly to the cart from the list when appropriate

incoming_params.description: Product category filter, e.g., 'aftercare', 'skincare', or 'accessories'
Maximum price filter in dollars (e.g., 30 for products $30 or less)
Minimum star rating filter (e.g., 4 for '4 stars & up')
Filter to restrict products by fulfillment method (e.g., 'in_store_pickup')
Sort key for the products list (e.g., 'price_asc', 'rating_desc')
Pagination index for the products list

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a product's name, image, or 'View Details' link
Click cart icon or 'View Cart / Booking Summary' after adding products

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Shop' header link (defaulting to categoryId=aftercare)
Accessible via 'Shop Products' footer link
Filters, sorting, and pagination controlled via query parameters

pages.name: Product Detail
pages.description: Detailed product page for retail and aftercare items, used to review product information before adding to cart.
primary_functions: Display product images, detailed description, ingredients, usage instructions, price, and rating
Show availability and fulfillment options, emphasizing in_store_pickup when available
Allow users to select quantity and add the product to the cart
Provide navigation back to the filtered product list in Shop Products

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the product to display information for

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Cart' after adding the product
Click 'Back to Products' link

access_methods.description: Accessed via URLs containing ?productId=... from the shop catalog or promotions

pages.name: Cart & Booking Summary
pages.description: Unified summary page for all pending items, including service appointments, packages, custom sessions, products, and gift cards, with the ability to apply promotions and adjust items before checkout.
primary_functions: List all appointments and sessions with service names, dates, times, durations, and technicians where applicable
List all products and gift cards with quantities and prices
Allow users to modify or remove items (e.g., remove a service from a custom session or delete a product)
Display subtotal, taxes/fees if applicable, and total cost for all items
Provide a promo code input field to apply promotions (e.g., 10% off waxing packages over $100 with a code like 'wax10') and show the resulting discount
Offer actions to continue shopping or proceed to the Checkout page

incoming_params.description: Optional promo code passed from the Offers page to pre-fill the discount code field
Optional origin page indicator for analytics and 'Continue shopping' behavior

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Proceed to Checkout'
Click 'View available offers' near the promo code field
Click 'Reschedule' on a single-service appointment item (parameters depend on which appointment is being edited)
Click 'Continue Shopping' when the last added items are products

access_methods.description: Accessed via a cart/booking summary icon or link displayed globally in the site header
Optional promoCode parameter may pre-populate the promo code entry

pages.name: Checkout
pages.description: Final step where users review their order and enter necessary contact and payment details (up to but not including real payment entry), confirming service bookings, gift cards, and product purchases.
primary_functions: Display a final, read-only summary of all appointments, sessions, packages, products, and gift cards being purchased
Collect customer contact information and any required preferences for confirmations and reminders
Show applied promo codes and the final total price after discounts
Allow users to proceed through the checkout steps up to the point of entering payment details (stopping before real payment is completed)

incoming_params.description: Optional origin indicator (e.g., 'cart') to support navigation back to the appropriate summary

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Cart & Booking Summary' to adjust items before finalizing
Click a 'Terms & Conditions' or 'Privacy Policy' link within checkout

access_methods.description: Accessed after clicking 'Proceed to Checkout' on Cart & Booking Summary

pages.name: Gift Cards
pages.description: Overview of available gift card options, including waxing-only gift cards, with simple filters by usage type.
primary_functions: List available gift card types such as waxing_only, spa_combination, or monetary_value cards
Provide filters or sections to highlight 'Waxing Only' or 'Waxing Services' cards
Allow users to select a specific gift card type to configure on the Gift Card Detail page
Educate users on how gift cards can be used (e.g., for waxing services only or for any service)

incoming_params.description: Optional filter to show only certain gift card usages, such as 'waxing_only' or 'waxing_services'

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a specific gift card type or 'Select' button

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Gift Cards' header link
Accessible via 'Gift Cards' footer link

pages.name: Gift Card Detail
pages.description: Configuration page for purchasing a specific gift card, including amount and scheduled email delivery, before adding it to the cart.
primary_functions: Allow users to choose or enter a gift card amount (e.g., $100)
Let users select a delivery method such as email_delivery versus physical_card if applicable
Enable scheduling of email delivery by choosing a specific future date (e.g., exactly two weeks from today)
Collect recipient name, recipient email, and an optional personal message
Add the configured gift card to the cart and provide a path to proceed to Cart or Checkout

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the gift card template to configure (e.g., a 'Waxing Only Gift Card')

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Add to Cart' followed by 'View Cart' or 'Proceed to Checkout'
Click 'Back to Gift Cards'

access_methods.description: Accessed when a gift card template is selected and ?templateId=... is present

pages.name: Offers & Promotions
pages.description: Central page listing current promotions and discount codes that can be applied to packages, services, products, and gift cards, including conditions and deep links to relevant booking flows.
primary_functions: Display current offers including details such as '10% off any waxing package over $100'
Show the exact promo code text for each offer (e.g., 'wax10') so users can copy or note it
Clarify eligibility conditions for each promotion (e.g., applies only to waxing packages above a certain price)
Provide links to relevant booking sections such as Waxing Packages or Waxing Services to help users use the offers

incoming_params.description: Optional filter for promotions by target type (e.g., 'waxing_package', 'service', 'product')

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View eligible waxing packages' on a package-specific offer
Click 'Browse services' from a service-related offer
Click 'Apply this code' on an offer that uses a promo code (e.g., WAX10)

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Offers' header link
Accessible via 'Offers & Promotions' footer link

pages.name: About
pages.description: Background information about the salon, staff, and service philosophy to build trust, including technician profiles and waxing specializations.
primary_functions: Introduce the salons story, team, and approach to waxing and aftercare
Highlight certifications, hygiene standards, and any specializations (e.g., mens waxing expertise)
Provide secondary calls-to-action to start booking or get in touch

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Book a waxing service' from About content
Click 'Contact us' from About content

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'About' footer link
Linked from homepage where the salon story is summarized

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Contact information and inquiry form for the salon, enabling users to ask questions or request special accommodations.
primary_functions: Display salon address, map, phone number, email, and opening hours
Provide a simple contact form for general questions or special requests
Offer quick links back to main booking sections (Waxing Services, Packages) for users who decide to book instead of sending a message

incoming_params.description: Optional pre-filled subject for the contact form (e.g., 'Cancellation policy question')

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click quick link 'View Waxing Services' from the contact page
Click quick link 'View Packages' from the contact page

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Contact' header link
Accessible via 'Contact' footer link

pages.name: Policies
pages.description: Consolidated page for salon policies including cancellations, late arrivals, returns, privacy, and terms, with sections deep-linkable via query parameters.
primary_functions: Explain booking, rescheduling, and cancellation policies that apply to waxing services, packages, and custom sessions
Describe return/refund policies for products and gift cards
Provide privacy and terms information related to online booking and purchases
Reassure users by clearly stating what to expect before and after their appointments

incoming_params.description: Optional policy section to scroll to or highlight (e.g., 'booking', 'cancellation', 'refund', 'privacy', 'terms')

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Contact us about this policy' link within any policy section

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Policies' footer link
Specific policy sections can be linked using the policyType query parameter

header_links.description: Return to the homepage with quick access to all main sections and featured content
Browse the full waxing services menu with filters for area, duration, and price
View waxing services filtered for men, including chest and back waxing
Create a custom multi-area waxing appointment with live duration and price totals
Browse waxing packages that bundle multiple services at a value price
Shop waxing aftercare and related products, filterable by price, rating, and pickup options
Purchase gift cards including waxing-only options with email delivery
See current promotions and promo codes for waxing services and packages
View salon contact information and send a message or inquiry

footer_links.description: Learn more about the salon, team, and approach to waxing
Go to the complete waxing services menu
Browse all retail and aftercare products
Buy gift cards for waxing and other services
View current deals, discounts, and promo codes
Find contact details and send the salon a message
Read booking, cancellation, privacy, and other salon policies
